message:
test(voi-sampling): add 36 unit tests for VOI sampling policy

Cover config clamping, accessors, summary stats, snapshot, log rotation,
JSONL serialization, time/event-based forcing/blocking, decision reasons,
beta distribution math, boundary score, and e-process updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
